description: Massive seeded memory + long history — Context Contract must still produce output under STANDARD_BUDGET (3200) by truncating DYNAMIC/HISTORY. Required slots preserved.

input.message: Tell me about my preferences and routines.

conversationHistory.content: I mentioned last week that I prefer early meetings. And I like espresso. And I'm allergic to peanuts.
Got it — I've noted those. Morning meetings, espresso, peanut allergy.
Also remember my partner is lactose intolerant.

compiledArtifacts.content: Name: Alex (user-budget-01). Partner: Sarah. Timezone: America/New_York. Language: English. Prefers morning meetings. Loves espresso. Peanut allergy. Sarah: lactose intolerant. Lives in Miami. Works remote.
Morning-coffee-before-work (daily 7am). Sunday-meal-prep (weekly). Monthly expense review on last Friday.
Shared: grocery list, calendar, expenses. Sarah handles grocery shopping; Alex handles bills. Weekend activities: hiking, brunch.
Home: Miami condo. Pets: cat named Luna. Utilities auto-paid. Rent on the 1st.
